{{Quote|I know that long before your people arrived the Vagaari came to our worlds, conquering and destroying and taking everything of value to themselves. They used us as laborers and craftspeople and slaves. They sent us into unsafe mines and dangerous mountains, and forced us to walk before them on warfields that we might die instead of them.|Supreme Commander Estosh, posing as a Geroon, to [[Dean Jinzler]]|<ref name="SQ">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>}}
The '''Geroon''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] hailed from the [[Geroon|epynomous]] [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] [[planet]]. They were [[Battle of Geroon|captured]] and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="OBF" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> Around nine Geroons were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series]] and [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] under the directive of the Vagaari leader, the [[Unidentified Miskara (Jorj Car'das)|Miskara]], and many of them [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] within [[zero-g plastic bubble]]s on the [[Vagaari slaver fleet|Vagaari fleet's]] [[Hull/Legends|hulls]]. They were [[Battle for Outbound Flight|freed]] by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] species and their [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|government]], the Chiss Ascendancy, after the Chiss defeated the Vagaari. Ascendancy [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ar'alani/Legends|Ar'alani]] provided [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] to the Geroons aboard a [[Ar'alani's transport ship|transport]].<ref name="OBF" />

Around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]],<ref name="CNTERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]'' to around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]].</ref> a [[Unidentified Geroon|Geroon]] was acquainted with the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Sele (Cathar)|Sele]],<ref name="CN">''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]''</ref> and in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],<ref name="SQTERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].</ref> several Vagaari—including [[Supreme Commander (Vagaari)|Supreme Commander]] [[Estosh]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Bearsh]] and [[Purpsh]]—posed as Geroons to [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|infiltrate]] the Chiss expedition to the remains of ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Many of the expedition's members did not notice the deception, but Ascendancy [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano|Formbi]] knew that and let them accompany his party to [[Plot to begin a war against the Vagaari Empire|begin]] a war against the slavers. The Vagaari were eventually [[Skirmish aboard Dreadnaught-Four|defeated]] by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="SQ" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Geroon were first mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' written by [[Timothy Zahn]],<ref name="SQ" /> and later appeared in Zahn's [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="OBF" />
